situational_context: Running comeback progressing well: 3 runs completed since gap broken on 2026-05-03 (after 182 days off). Run #1: 2.47 km (May 3), Run #2: 2.01 km (May 9), Run #3: 3.53 km (May 15). Run #3 exceeded protocol max (2.5 km) by 41% but FC well-controlled in Z2 (avg 139 bpm) — consolidation needed before further distance increase. Primary modality remains gravel/e-bike commuting. Today's gravel session (14.3 km, 49 min, Z2) replaces planned road velo. Chronic load flat at 22.0 (down from 22.3 two days ago) — detraining phase as April's big gravels exit the 28d window. ACWR at 0.75 — safely in rebuild zone. HRV stable (weekly avg 39, BALANCED); RHR slightly up to 50 bpm (was 49). VO2max running improved to 38.7 post-Run #3. Weight at new low 103.32 kg (down 0.78 kg since May 8) — trajectory excellent for -10 kg goal. Sleep marginally short last night (6.4h) but 7d avg adequate at 7.06h. No new labs since Dec 2025. Comeback protocol (return-to-running.md) active — tissue tolerance, not cardio, is the limiting factor. Birthday party blocks Saturday training; plan adapted. Vitamin D retest due ~July 2026.

recommendations.text: Execute Run #4 Sunday (May 18): consolidate at 3.5 km max, do NOT increase distance. Run #3 exceeded protocol — tissue needs time to adapt at 103 kg. Maintain 72h inter-run spacing.
recommendations.measurable: Run #4 completed Sunday, distance <=3.5 km, no post-run pain lasting >24h

recommendations.text: Eccentric calf raises 3x/week — critical injury prevention for Achilles at current body weight during running comeback. Heavy Slow Resistance protocol preferred.
recommendations.measurable: >=3 calf-raise sessions logged in the next 7 days

recommendations.text: Reduce caloric surplus: 7d avg intake ~2910 kcal vs 2500 target (+410 kcal/day). Fat intake particularly elevated. Weight still declining (103.3 kg, new low) so deficit exists, but tightening adherence would accelerate toward 95 kg goal.
recommendations.measurable: 7d avg calories <=2700 kcal next week, fat <=100g/day

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized joint/tendon pain lasting >24h after Run #3 or #4 triggers skip of next run
markers_to_watch.reason: Run #3 exceeded protocol by 41% — monitoring tissue response at 103 kg is critical

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if drops below 20 (currently 22.0, declining as April gravels exit window)
markers_to_watch.reason: Detraining status confirmed — need consistent sessions to arrest decline

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if RHR rises >5 bpm above 50 bpm baseline for 3+ consecutive days
markers_to_watch.reason: RHR slightly up from 49 to 50-51; could indicate cumulative fatigue from adding running back
